docs.title: Home
docs.text: Turn nyaa.si torrent pages into neat Python objects

docs.title: About
docs.text:
• Supports both sync and async.
  • Provides easy access to every field except comments (comments are useless).
  • Parses both the nyaa page itself and it's accompanying .torrent file.

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
pynyaa is available on PyPI, so you can simply use pip to install it.

pip install pynyaa

docs.title: License
docs.text: Distributed under the Unlicense License. See UNLICENSE for more information.

docs.title: CLI
docs.text: pynyaa offers a very simple command-line interface.

docs.title: Usage
docs.text: Command Description pynyaa <url> Prints the JSON representation of a Nyaa torrent page.

docs.title: Options
docs.text: Option Short Form Type Default Description --indent <level> -i int None Indentation level for JSON output. --include <keys...> -inc list[str] None Keys to include in the JSON output. --exclude <keys...> -exc list[str] None Keys to exclude from the JSON output.

docs.title: Examples
docs.text:
1. $ pynyaa https://nyaa.si/view/1839609 -i 2

    {
  "id": 1839609,
  "url": "https://nyaa.si/view/1839609",
  "title": "[SubsPlease] One Piece - 1110 (1080p) [B66CAB32].mkv",
  "category": "Anime - English-translated",
  "datetime": "2024-06-30T02:12:07Z",
  "submitter": {
    "name": "subsplease",
    "url": "https://nyaa.si/user/subsplease",
    "is_trusted": true,
    "is_banned": false
  },
  "information": "https://subsplease.org/",

  "leechers": 106,

    "name": "[SubsPlease] One Piece - 1110 (1080p) [B66CAB32].mkv",
    "size": 1455173416,
    "infohash": "767d16e0aef5888b1a513a26709e963478ed4123",
    "piece_size": 1048576,

      ["http://nyaa.tracker.wf:7777/announce"],

    ],
    "comment": "https://nyaa.si/view/1839609",
    "creation_date": "2024-06-30T07:42:07",

        "file": "[SubsPlease] One Piece - 1110 (1080p) [B66CAB32].mkv",

}

  2. $ pynyaa https://nyaa.si/view/1839609 -i 2 --include url title category date

    {
  "url": "https://nyaa.si/view/1839609",
  "title": "[SubsPlease] One Piece - 1110 (1080p) [B66CAB32].mkv",
  "category": "Anime - English-translated",
  "datetime": "2024-06-30T02:12:07Z"
}

  3. $ pynyaa https://nyaa.si/view/1839609 -i 2 --exclude description magnet torrent

  "url": "https://nyaa.si/view/1839609",
  "title": "[SubsPlease] One Piece - 1110 (1080p) [B66CAB32].mkv",

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
import pynyaa

nyaa = pynyaa.get("https://nyaa.si/view/1693817")  # Full URL
nyaa = pynyaa.get(1693817)  # Only the ID also works

print(nyaa.title)
#> [LYS1TH3A] Fate/stay night Heaven's Feel I. Presage Flower (2017) (BD 1080p HEVC x265 10-bit Opus) [Dual-Audio]
print(nyaa.submitter)
#> pog42
print(nyaa.torrent.files)
#> [File('Fate.stay.night.Heavens.Feel.I.Presage.Flower.2017.1080p.BluRay.Opus5.1.H.265-LYS1TH3A.mkv', size=12263052206)]
print(nyaa.torrent.infohash)
#> 6fdc0395a7fdde6ce3fb7f144b31f3cabdcbf537

torrents = pynyaa.search("LYS1TH3A")

for torrent in torrents:
    print(torrent)
    #> [LYS1TH3A] Fate/Zero Season 1 (BD 1080p HEVC x265 10-bit Opus) [Dual-Audio]
    #> [LYS1TH3A] Tamako Market Season 1 (BD 1080p HEVC x265 10-bit Opus) [Dual-Audio]
    #> [LYS1TH3A] Tamako Love Story (2014) (BD 1080p HEVC x265 10-bit Opus) [Dual-Audio]

docs.title: Advanced
docs.text:
If you're doing anything more than quick experiments or one-off scripts, it's best to use the Nyaa/AsyncNyaa client directly. They give you far more flexibility and control over the requests along with improved performance.

Note

For more details, see the HTTPX documentation on clients.

Using the same example as above but with the Nyaa client: 

from pynyaa import Nyaa

with Nyaa() as client:
    nyaa = client.get("https://nyaa.si/view/1693817")

    print(nyaa.title)
    #> [LYS1TH3A] Fate/stay night Heaven's Feel I. Presage Flower (2017) (BD 1080p HEVC x265 10-bit Opus) [Dual-Audio]

    torrents = client.search("LYS1TH3A")

    for torrent in torrents:
        print(torrent)
        #> [LYS1TH3A] Fate/Zero Season 1 (BD 1080p HEVC x265 10-bit Opus) [Dual-Audio]
        #> [LYS1TH3A] Tamako Market Season 1 (BD 1080p HEVC x265 10-bit Opus) [Dual-Audio]
        #> [LYS1TH3A] Tamako Love Story (2014) (BD 1080p HEVC x265 10-bit Opus) [Dual-Audio]

You can also pass your own instance of an httpx.Client to the Nyaa client. This gives you complete control over the requests. For example, we can use this to quickly implement aggressive caching with hishel:

from hishel import CacheClient, Controller, InMemoryStorage

from pynyaa import Nyaa

storage = InMemoryStorage(capacity=256)
controller = Controller(force_cache=True)

with Nyaa(client=CacheClient(storage=storage, controller=controller)) as client:
    nyaa1 = client.get("https://nyaa.si/view/1693817")  # First request
    nyaa2 = client.get("https://nyaa.si/view/1693817")  # Returns the cached result

docs.title: Nyaa
docs.text:
Nyaa(base_url: str = 'https://nyaa.si/', client: Client | None = None)

A client for interacting with Nyaa.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default base_url str

The base URL of Nyaa. This is used for constructing the full URL from relative URLs.

'https://nyaa.si/' client Client

An httpx.Client instance used to make requests to Nyaa.

None Source code in src/pynyaa/_clients/_sync.py 
def __init__(self, base_url: str = "https://nyaa.si/", client: Client | None = None) -> None:
    """
    A client for interacting with Nyaa.

    Parameters
    ----------
    base_url : str, optional
        The base URL of Nyaa.
        This is used for constructing the full URL from relative URLs.
    client : Client, optional
        An [`httpx.Client`](https://www.python-httpx.org/api/#client) instance used to make requests to Nyaa.
    """
    self._base_url = base_url
    self._client = Client(headers={"user-agent": f"pynyaa/{__version__}"}) if client is None else client

docs.title: get
docs.text:
get(page: int | str) -> NyaaTorrentPage

Retrieve information from a Nyaa torrent page.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default page int or str

The torrent page. This can either be a URL like https://nyaa.si/view/123456 or just the ID like 123456

required

Raises:

Type Description HTTPStatusError

Nyaa returned a non 2xx response.

TypeError

If the 'page' parameter is not an int or str.

Returns:

Type Description NyaaTorrentPage

A NyaaTorrentPage object representing the retrieved data.

Source code in src/pynyaa/_clients/_sync.py 
def get(self, page: int | str, /) -> NyaaTorrentPage:
    """
    Retrieve information from a Nyaa torrent page.

    Parameters
    ----------
    page : int or str
        The torrent page.
        This can either be a URL like `https://nyaa.si/view/123456`
        or just the ID like `123456`

    Raises
    ------
    HTTPStatusError
        Nyaa returned a non 2xx response.
    TypeError
        If the 'page' parameter is not an int or str.

    Returns
    -------
    NyaaTorrentPage
        A NyaaTorrentPage object representing the retrieved data.
    """

    match page:
        case int():
            id = page
        case str():
            try:
                id = int(page.rstrip("/").split("/")[-1])
            except ValueError:
                raise ValueError(f"Invalid format. Expected a valid URL or numeric ID, got {page!r}.")
        case _:
            raise TypeError(f"Invalid type. Expected 'int' or 'str', got {type(page).__name__!r}.")

    url = urljoin(self._base_url, f"/view/{id}")
    nyaa = self._client.get(url)
    nyaa.raise_for_status()
    parsed = PageParser(html=nyaa.text, base_url=self.base_url)
    panel = parsed.panel()

    return NyaaTorrentPage(
        id=id,
        url=url,
        title=panel.title(),
        category=panel.category(),
        datetime=panel.datetime(),
        submitter=panel.submitter(),
        information=panel.information(),
        seeders=panel.seeders(),
        leechers=panel.leechers(),
        completed=panel.completed(),
        size=panel.filesize(),
        infohash=panel.infohash(),
        is_trusted=parsed.is_trusted(),
        is_remake=parsed.is_remake(),
        description=parsed.description(),
        torrent=panel.torrent(),
        magnet=panel.magnet(),
    )

docs.title: search
docs.text:
search(query: str, *, category: ParentCategory | Category = ParentCategory.ALL, filter: Filter = Filter.NO_FILTER, sort_by: SortBy = SortBy.DATETIME, reverse: bool = False) -> Iterator[NyaaTorrentPage]

Search for torrents on Nyaa.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default query str

The search query.

required category ParentCategory | Category

The category to narrow down the search results.

ALL filter Filter

Specifies the filter to apply to the search results.

NO_FILTER sort_by SortBy

Defines how to sort the results.

DATETIME reverse bool

Determines the order of the results: ascending if True, descending if False.

False

Raises:

Type Description HTTPStatusError

Nyaa returned a non 2xx response.

Yields:

Type Description NyaaTorrentPage

A NyaaTorrentPage object representing the retrieved data.

Source code in src/pynyaa/_clients/_sync.py 
def search(
    self,
    query: str,
    *,
    category: ParentCategory | Category = ParentCategory.ALL,
    filter: Filter = Filter.NO_FILTER,
    sort_by: SortBy = SortBy.DATETIME,
    reverse: bool = False,
) -> Iterator[NyaaTorrentPage]:
    """
    Search for torrents on Nyaa.

    Parameters
    ----------
    query : str
        The search query.
    category : ParentCategory | Category, optional
        The category to narrow down the search results.
    filter : Filter, optional
        Specifies the filter to apply to the search results.
    sort_by : SortBy, optional
        Defines how to sort the results.
    reverse : bool, optional
        Determines the order of the results: ascending if `True`, descending if `False`.

    Raises
    ------
    HTTPStatusError
        Nyaa returned a non 2xx response.

    Yields
    -------
    NyaaTorrentPage
        A NyaaTorrentPage object representing the retrieved data.
    """
    params: dict[str, Any] = dict(
        f=filter,
        c=category.id,
        q=query,
        s=sort_by,
        o="asc" if reverse else "desc",  # desc is the default on nyaa
    )

    first = self._client.get(self._base_url, params=params)
    first.raise_for_status()
    for link in parse_nyaa_search_results(first.text):
        yield self.get(link)

    pages = bs4.BeautifulSoup(first.text, "lxml").select("ul.pagination > li:not(.next) > a[href]")
    for page in pages:
        params["p"] = page.get_text()
        other = self._client.get(self._base_url, params=params)
        other.raise_for_status()
        for link in parse_nyaa_search_results(other.text):
            yield self.get(link)

Retrieve information from a Nyaa torrent page.

async def get(self, page: int | str, /) -> NyaaTorrentPage:
    """
    Retrieve information from a Nyaa torrent page.

    Parameters
    ----------
    page : int or str
        The torrent page.
        This can either be a URL like `https://nyaa.si/view/123456`
        or just the ID like `123456`

    Raises
    ------
    HTTPStatusError
        Nyaa returned a non 2xx response.
    TypeError
        If the 'page' parameter is not an int or str.

    Returns
    -------
    NyaaTorrentPage
        A NyaaTorrentPage object representing the retrieved data.
    """

    match page:
        case int():
            id = page
        case str():
            try:
                id = int(page.rstrip("/").split("/")[-1])
            except ValueError:
                raise ValueError(f"Invalid format. Expected a valid URL or numeric ID, got {page!r}.")
        case _:
            raise TypeError(f"Invalid type. Expected 'int' or 'str', got {type(page).__name__!r}.")

    url = urljoin(self._base_url, f"/view/{id}")
    nyaa = await self._client.get(url)
    nyaa.raise_for_status()
    parsed = PageParser(html=nyaa.text, base_url=self.base_url)
    panel = parsed.panel()

    return NyaaTorrentPage(
        id=id,
        url=url,
        title=panel.title(),
        category=panel.category(),
        datetime=panel.datetime(),
        submitter=panel.submitter(),
        information=panel.information(),
        seeders=panel.seeders(),
        leechers=panel.leechers(),
        completed=panel.completed(),
        size=panel.filesize(),
        infohash=panel.infohash(),
        is_trusted=parsed.is_trusted(),
        is_remake=parsed.is_remake(),
        description=parsed.description(),
        torrent=panel.torrent(),
        magnet=panel.magnet(),
    )

async def search(
    self,
    query: str,
    *,
    category: ParentCategory | Category = ParentCategory.ALL,
    filter: Filter = Filter.NO_FILTER,
    sort_by: SortBy = SortBy.DATETIME,
    reverse: bool = False,
) -> AsyncIterator[NyaaTorrentPage]:
    """
    Search for torrents on Nyaa.

    Parameters
    ----------
    query : str
        The search query.
    category : ParentCategory | Category, optional
        The category to narrow down the search results.
    filter : Filter, optional
        Specifies the filter to apply to the search results.
    sort_by : SortBy, optional
        Defines how to sort the results.
    reverse : bool, optional
        Determines the order of the results: ascending if `True`, descending if `False`.

    Raises
    ------
    HTTPStatusError
        Nyaa returned a non 2xx response.

    Yields
    -------
    NyaaTorrentPage
        A NyaaTorrentPage object representing the retrieved data.
    """
    params: dict[str, Any] = dict(
        f=filter,
        c=category.id,
        q=query,
        s=sort_by,
        o="asc" if reverse else "desc",  # desc is the default on nyaa
    )

    first = await self._client.get(self._base_url, params=params)
    first.raise_for_status()
    for link in parse_nyaa_search_results(first.text):
        yield await self.get(link)

    pages = bs4.BeautifulSoup(first.text, "lxml").select("ul.pagination > li:not(.next) > a[href]")
    for page in pages:
        params["p"] = page.get_text()
        other = await self._client.get(self._base_url, params=params)
        other.raise_for_status()
        for link in parse_nyaa_search_results(other.text):
            yield await self.get(link)

docs.title: Category
docs.text:
Category(value: str, id: str)

Bases: Enum

Represents the categories to which a torrent on Nyaa belongs. This enum supports case-insensitive lookup by member name, value, or ID.

Examples:

>>> Category("ANIME_RAW")
<Category.ANIME_RAW: 'Anime - Raw'>

>>> Category("Literature - English-translated")
<Category.LITERATURE_ENGLISH_TRANSLATED: 'Literature - English-translated'>

>>> Category("2_1")
<Category.AUDIO_LOSSLESS: 'Audio - Lossless'>
Source code in src/pynyaa/_enums.py 
def __init__(self, value: str, id: str) -> None:
    self._value_ = value
    self._id = id

docs.title: id property

id: CategoryID

Returns the ID of the category.

Examples:

```py

Category.ANIME_ENGLISH_TRANSLATED.id == "1_2" True

docs.title: parent property
docs.text:
parent: ParentCategory

Returns the corresponding ParentCategory for this category.

Examples:

>>> Category.ANIME_ENGLISH_TRANSLATED.parent == ParentCategory.ANIME
True

docs.title: _missing_ classmethod
docs.text:
_missing_(value: object) -> Self
Source code in src/pynyaa/_enums.py 
@classmethod
def _missing_(cls, value: object) -> Self:
    msg = f"'{value}' is not a valid {cls.__name__}"

    if isinstance(value, str):
        value = value.casefold().strip()
        for member in cls:
            if (value == member.value.casefold()) or (value == member.name.casefold()) or (value == member.id):
                return member
        raise ValueError(msg)
    raise ValueError(msg)

docs.title: ParentCategory
docs.text:
ParentCategory(value: str, id: str)

Bases: Enum

Represents the top-level categories on Nyaa. This enum supports case-insensitive lookup by member name, value, or ID.

Examples:

>>> ParentCategory("anime")
<ParentCategory.ANIME: 'Anime'>

>>> ParentCategory("Live_Action")
<ParentCategory.LIVE_ACTION: 'Live Action'>

>>> ParentCategory("3_0")
<ParentCategory.LITERATURE: 'Literature'>
Source code in src/pynyaa/_enums.py 
def __init__(self, value: str, id: str) -> None:
    self._value_ = value
    self._id = id

id: ParentCategoryID

Returns the ID of the category.

Examples:

>>> ParentCategory.ANIME.id == "1_0"
True
>>> ParentCategory.ALL.id == "0_0"
True

@classmethod
def _missing_(cls, value: object) -> Self:
    msg = f"'{value}' is not a valid {cls.__name__}"

    if isinstance(value, str):
        value = value.casefold().strip()
        for member in cls:
            if (value == member.value.casefold()) or (value == member.name.casefold()):
                return member
        raise ValueError(msg)
    raise ValueError(msg)

docs.title: Filter
docs.text:
Filter(value: str | int)

Bases: IntEnum

Source code in src/pynyaa/_enums.py 
def __init__(self, value: str | int): ...

docs.title: _missing_ classmethod
docs.text:
_missing_(value: object) -> Self
Source code in src/pynyaa/_enums.py 
@classmethod
def _missing_(cls, value: object) -> Self:
    msg = f"'{value}' is not a valid {cls.__name__}"
    match value:
        case str():
            for member in cls:
                if value.casefold().strip() == member.name.casefold():
                    return member
            raise ValueError(msg)
        case int():
            for member in cls:
                if value == member.value:
                    return member
            raise ValueError(msg)
        case _:
            raise ValueError(msg)

docs.title: NyaaTorrentPage dataclass
docs.text:
NyaaTorrentPage(*, id: int, url: str, title: str, category: Category, submitter: Submitter | None, datetime: datetime, information: str | None, seeders: int, leechers: int, completed: int, size: int, infohash: str, is_trusted: bool, is_remake: bool, description: str | None, torrent: str, magnet: str)

Represents Nyaa's torrent page.

docs.title: datetime instance-attribute
docs.text:
datetime: datetime

Date and time at which the torrent was submitted.

docs.title: is_remake instance-attribute
docs.text:
is_remake: bool

Indicates whether the upload is a remake (red) or not.

Note

An upload can be both trusted and a remake, in which case, the remake takes priority, that is, is_remake will be True and is_trusted will be False.

docs.title: is_trusted instance-attribute
docs.text:
is_trusted: bool

Indicates whether the upload is trusted (green) or not.

Note

An upload can be both trusted and a remake, in which case, the remake takes priority, that is, is_remake will be True and is_trusted will be False.

docs.title: magnet instance-attribute
docs.text:
magnet: str

Magnet link of the torrent.

Note

The magnet link provided by Nyaa is different from the one you'll get if you simply generated it from the .torrent file itself because Nyaa strips away all trackers except it's own and the ones listed here.

docs.title: submitter instance-attribute
docs.text:
submitter: Submitter | None

User who submitted the torrent. This will be None if the submitter is anonymous.

docs.title: url instance-attribute
docs.text:
url: str

URL to the Nyaa torrent page (https://nyaa.si/view/123456).
